phrases.tokens_html: 好噢，我们一起起来。
几年前，妈妈用来开玩笑。
phrases.translation: Mom used it as a joke years ago.

phrases.tokens_html: 回来找对不起的多？
phrases.translation: Come back to look for sorry?

phrases.tokens_html: 为什么要告诉这儿？
家里认为这是死？
看看像一下？
抱歉，我们需要给出来？
phrases.translation: Sorry, we need to give it out?

phrases.tokens_html: 这些事情最吗？
一家人怎么可以让？
phrases.translation: How can a family let it go?

phrases.tokens_html: 有多少时间去说？
phrases.translation: How much time do you have to talk?

phrases.tokens_html: 不过，你大可以带？
会有什么干话？
怎么样才能找到这里？
phrases.translation: How can I find it here?

phrases.tokens_html: 感觉这么快？
在工作中谢谢了！
有还有什么可能？
从这样一来，问题就被叫做？
phrases.translation: From this the question is called?

phrases.tokens_html: 只是可以比拟？
希望他们不要杀？
朋友也许又发生了？
明白了，我们可以帮？
再将东西准备做？
非常错，但是我们只能？
phrases.translation: Very wrong, but can we only?

phrases.tokens_html: 嘿，今天就是这里？
呃，都想知道相信？
phrases.translation: Uh, want to know and believe?

phrases.tokens_html: 哦，我觉得请求？
对了，已经一样上？
phrases.translation: By the way, already on the same?

phrases.tokens_html: 所有拿出来，是的？
然后他们来了？
有那么多的事情？
那么当一切发生？
phrases.translation: So when does it all happen?

phrases.tokens_html: 你们不可以就是？

zh|还.definition: still; still in progress; still more; to pay back; to return;

zh|多少.definition: number; amount; somewhat; how much?; how many?; (phone number, student ID etc) what number?

zh|看看.definition: to take a look at; to examine; to survey

zh|家.definition:
see 傢伙|家伙[jia1 huo5]; 
; home; family; (polite) my (sister, uncle etc)

zh|中.definition: within; among; in; to hit (the mark); to be hit by; to suffer

zh|起.definition: to rise; to raise; to get up

zh|比拟.definition: to compare; to draw a parallel; to match

zh|上.definition:
used in 上聲|上声[shang3 sheng1]; 
; on top; upon; above

zh|出来.definition: to come out; to appear; to arise; (after a verb, indicates coming out, completion of an action, or ability to discern or detect);

zh|吗.definition:
see 嗎啡|吗啡, morphine; 
; (question particle for "yes-no" questions);

zh|发生.definition: to happen; to occur; to take place

zh|那么.definition: like that; in that way; or so

zh|这么.definition: so much; this much; how much?

zh|你.definition: you (informal, as opposed to courteous 您[nin2]);

zh|让.definition: to yield; to permit; to let sb do sth

zh|干.definition: dry; clean; in vain; to concern; to interfere; shield; tree trunk; main part of sth; to manage

zh|将.definition: will; shall; to use; general; commander-in-chief (military); king (chess piece); to desire; to invite; to request

zh|会.definition: can (i.e. have the skill, know how to); likely to; sure to; to balance an account; accountancy; accounting

zh|告诉.definition:
to press charges; to file a complaint; 
; to tell; to inform; to let know

zh|想.definition: to think; to believe; to suppose

zh|开.definition: to open; to start; to turn on

zh|来.definition: to come; to arrive; to come round

zh|做.definition: to do; to make; to produce

zh|拿.definition: to hold; to seize; to catch

zh|东西.definition:
east and west; 
; thing; stuff; person

zh|起来.definition: to stand up; to get up; also pr. [qi3 lai2]; (after a verb) indicating the beginning and continuation of an action or a state; indicating an upward movement (e.g. after 站[zhan4]); indicating completion

zh|希望.definition: to wish for; to desire; hope

zh|给.definition: to; for; for the benefit of; to supply; to provide;

zh|大.definition: big; huge; large; see 大夫[dai4 fu5];

zh|说.definition:
to persuade; 
; to speak; to say; to explain

zh|都.definition: all; both; entirely; capital city; metropolis;

zh|需要.definition: to need; to want; to demand

zh|一起.definition: in the same place; together; with

zh|只.definition:
only; merely; just; grain that has begun to ripen; 
; classifier for birds and certain animals, one of a pair, some utensils, vessels etc;

zh|就是.definition: (emphasizes that sth is precisely or exactly as stated); precisely; exactly

zh|感觉.definition: to feel; to become aware of; feeling

zh|为.definition: as (in the capacity of); to take sth as; to act as; because of; for; to

zh|杀.definition: to kill; to murder; to attack

zh|当.definition:
(onom.) dong; ding dong (bell); 
; to be; to act as; manage; at or in the very same...; suitable; adequate

zh|这样.definition: this kind of; so; this way

zh|有.definition: to have; there is; there are

zh|知道.definition: to know; to become aware of; also pr. [zhi1 dao5]

zh|帮.definition: to help; to assist; to support

zh|能.definition: can; to be able to; might possibly

zh|相信.definition: to be convinced (that sth is true); to believe; to accept sth as true

zh|找.definition: to try to find; to look for; to call on sb

zh|像.definition: to resemble; to be like; to look as if

zh|了.definition: (completed action marker); (modal particle indicating change of state, situation now); (modal particle intensifying preceding clause); (of eyes) bright; clear-sighted; to understand clearly

zh|用.definition: to use; to employ; to have to

zh|才.definition: ability; talent; sb of a certain type

zh|要.definition: to demand; to request; to coerce; important; vital; to want

zh|抱歉.definition: to be sorry; to feel apologetic; sorry!

zh|叫做.definition: to be called; to be known as;

zh|工作.definition: to work; (of a machine) to operate; job

zh|去.definition: to go; to go to (a place); (of a time etc) last

zh|这.definition: this; these; (commonly pr. [zhei4] before a classifier, esp. in Beijing)

zh|认为.definition: to believe; to think; to consider
